export async function loadCustomWorkouts(planName){const userId=await getUserId();if(!userId)return[];const{data,error}=await supabase.from('custom_workouts').select('*').eq('user_id',userId).eq('plan_name',planName||'Default 8-week plan').order('created_at',{ascending:true});if(error){console.error('loadCustomWorkouts:',error.message);return[];}return data||[];}export async function saveCustomWorkout(workout,planName){var _workout$week_index,_workout$day_index,_workout$done;const userId=await getUserId();if(!userId)return null;const row={user_id:userId,plan_name:planName||'Default 8-week plan',week_index:(_workout$week_index=workout.week_index)!==null&&_workout$week_index!==void 0?_workout$week_index:-1,day_index:(_workout$day_index=workout.day_index)!==null&&_workout$day_index!==void 0?_workout$day_index:-1,title:workout.title,type:workout.type||'other',distance:workout.distance||null,duration:workout.duration||null,hr:workout.hr||null,notes:workout.notes||null,done:(_workout$done=workout.done)!==null&&_workout$done!==void 0?_workout$done:false,date:workout.date||null,updated_at:new Date().toISOString()};if(workout.id){// Update existing
